subject.primary: an extreme close-up of a massive ancient warrior hand with exactly SIX fingers, each finger thick and powerful with weathered bronze skin and ancient battle scars, gripping a luminous double helix DNA strand that pulses with blood-red and golden light between the fingers
subject.secondary: the sixth finger is anatomically correct and prominently visible, positioned naturally next to the pinky, slightly longer than the others, with the same weathered texture
subject.focal_point: the sixth finger gripping the DNA strand, tack-sharp with shallow depth of field blurring everything else

environment.location: abstract dark void with subtle suggestions of a genetics laboratory in extreme blur behind — test tubes and screens as bokeh shapes
environment.time_of_day: complete darkness except for the DNA glow and overhead spotlight
environment.atmosphere: uncanny valley horror — something deeply wrong about this hand

composition.rule: hand fills 60 percent of frame from left, sixth finger is the visual anchor, right 35 percent is dark negative space for text
composition.foreground: massive six-fingered hand in rich warm bronze and crimson skin tones
composition.midground: glowing DNA helix between the fingers in blood-red and gold
composition.background: pure black void with faint bokeh circles from out-of-focus lab equipment

lighting.key_light: the DNA helix itself as primary light source casting red-gold glow upward onto the fingers
lighting.fill_light: subtle warm amber from below highlighting the skin texture and scars
lighting.rim_light: razor-thin cold white edge on the top of each finger separating from black background
lighting.shadow_quality: extreme chiaroscuro, almost entirely shadow with selective illumination
lighting.mood: visceral body horror meets ancient biblical mystery

style.film_stock: Kodak Vision3 200T pushed two stops for extreme grain and contrast
style.post_processing: extreme high contrast, crushed blacks, hyper-detailed skin texture, macro photography feel, blood-red color grade
style.texture_detail: every pore and scar visible on the ancient skin, individual DNA base pairs visible in the helix, dust motes in the light beam

mood.emotion: primal unease — the uncanny valley of a hand that should not have six fingers

symbolism.primary: polydactyly as proof of Nephilim bloodline — 2 Samuel 21:20 the giant of Gath who had six fingers on each hand

negative_as_positive: clean surface without any visible text or watermarks
tack-sharp focus on the sixth finger and DNA strand
naturalistic skin tones with dramatic red-gold accent lighting
anatomically correct six-fingered hand with natural proportions

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: YouTube thumbnail macro shot. The hand MUST have exactly SIX fingers — this is the entire point of the image. The sixth finger must be clearly visible, anatomically correct, and prominently featured. The DNA double helix glows blood-red and gold between the fingers. Background is pure dark. Right 35% is clean dark space for text overlay. This is an extreme close-up — fill the frame with the hand.
